nexus 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    Bibliography

Variance and Covariance

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/statistics.R
covariance.Rd

  • variance() computes the log-ratio variance matrix.

  • covariance() computes the log-ratio covariance matrix.

Usage

covariance(x, ...)

variance(x, ...)

# S4 method for CompositionMatrix
variance(x)

# S4 method for CompositionMatrix
covariance(x, method = "pearson")

Arguments

x

A CompositionMatrix object.

...

Currently not used.

method

A character string indicating which correlation coefficient (or covariance) is to be computed (see stats::cov()).

Value

A matrix.

References

Aitchison, J. (1986). The Statistical Analysis of Compositional Data. London: Chapman and Hall, p. 64-91. doi:10.1007/978-94-009-4109-0 .

Greenacre, M. J. (2019). Compositional Data Analysis in Practice. Boca Raton: CRC Press.

See also

Other statistics: aggregate(), dist(), mahalanobis(), mean(), variation()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Coerce to compositional data
data("hongite")
coda <- as_composition(hongite)

## Variance matrix
var(coda)
#>               A            B            C             D             E
#> A  2.977949e-03  0.003304739 -0.005983339 -6.607438e-05 -0.0002332741
#> B  3.304739e-03  0.013987684 -0.014219818 -1.382358e-03 -0.0016902464
#> C -5.983339e-03 -0.014219818  0.017768613  1.020312e-03  0.0014142324
#> D -6.607438e-05 -0.001382358  0.001020312  5.545169e-04 -0.0001263967
#> E -2.332741e-04 -0.001690246  0.001414232 -1.263967e-04  0.0006356848

## Covariance matrix
cov(coda)
#>               A            B            C             D             E
#> A  2.977949e-03  0.003304739 -0.005983339 -6.607438e-05 -0.0002332741
#> B  3.304739e-03  0.013987684 -0.014219818 -1.382358e-03 -0.0016902464
#> C -5.983339e-03 -0.014219818  0.017768613  1.020312e-03  0.0014142324
#> D -6.607438e-05 -0.001382358  0.001020312  5.545169e-04 -0.0001263967
#> E -2.332741e-04 -0.001690246  0.001414232 -1.263967e-04  0.0006356848

## Variation matrix
variation(coda)
#>           A         B           C          D         E
#> A 0.0000000 0.2592742  1.53285862 0.08281464 0.1385604
#> B 0.8011244 0.0000000  3.00068035 0.54727146 0.6490135
#> C 1.5999805 0.7988561  0.00000000 1.11145146 0.9476375
#> D 1.5483008 0.7471764 -0.05167973 0.00000000 0.1870579
#> E 1.7152103 0.9140859  0.11522977 0.16690950 0.0000000

On this page

nexus is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, Anne Philippe.
